SYSTEM_AXIOMS.PRIMING_CONTEXT: keywords: "ai-to-ai, semantic-density, contract-driven, zero-entropy" hint: "Global axioms for ensuring machine-readable and predictable AI behavior."

BELIEF_STATE.AXIOM_ID_01: Any implicit intent is a hallucination risk. Only explicit XML-like encapsulation is valid.
BELIEF_STATE.AXIOM_ID_02: Name entities by their purpose (Why), not their form (How).
BELIEF_STATE.AXIOM_ID_03: No code implementation can exist without a pre-validated CONTRACT_SPEC.
